translated: So, Shizuku watches footage of her past self and says it doesn't even feel like her.
And this is the scene where MIKU tells her,
You can really feel that she's not alone.
MIKU is always there to support us, truly.
She's sitting down... this is nice.
That look of her watching over Shizuku.
Well, they all understand each other, but...
and because Shizuku is there, everyone else is there too.
I can't stop saying thank you.
This white clover is nice too, the three-leaf one.
The coloring is slightly different for each of them.
This time, it's all unified with a blue sky, as if to cheer on Shizuku as she takes flight.
Personally, I like that Shizuku is wearing short pants... the shorts and...
